name: Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd.
summary: Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, and sells telecommunication equipment in China. The company's main products include video conference products, integrated wiring products, low voltage distribution products, private network communication products, wiring products, and other products. It also offers multimedia communication and application solutions; general cabling; and out-door patch, sub-line equipment, network box (cube) of out-door, and machinery office, as well as exports and imports telecommunication equipment. The company is also involved in the development, production, and sales of the building intelligent products; manufacture and sales of software of telecommunications, network, and electronic equipment; manufacture and sales of communication electrical products, card-terminal communication equipment, industrial intelligent distribution products, and solar controllers; production, sales, and processing of electrical products; electronic components assembly; trading of technology; and research, development, transfer, and sales of hi-tech. The company offers its products to customers in domestic telecom operators, tower companies and industry customers in the government, finance, electric power, medical, rail transit and other fields. It also exports its products. Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China. Nanjing Putian Telecommunications Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of China Potevio Company Limited.
